    D

    DefectPipelineException - Exception Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.error
    Thrown when an instruction pipeline is broken or cannot be executed properly due to internal errors.
    DefectPipelineException(String, Exception) - Constructor for exception class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.error.DefectPipelineException
     
    description() - Method in record class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.ConfigInstruction
    Returns the value of the description record component.
    DivisionInstruction - Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.instructions
    Instruction handler that performs sequential integer division.
    DivisionInstruction(byte, int, ICondition) - Constructor for class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.instructions.DivisionInstruction
     
    dk.tij.registermaschine.core - module dk.tij.registermaschine.core
    The core engine of the Registermaschine system.
    dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation - package dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation
    Concrete implementations for the Registermaschine compilation pipeline.
    dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.api - package dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.api
    Public API for the Registermaschine compilation pipeline.

    dk.tij.registermaschine.core.conditions - package dk.tij.registermaschine.core.conditions
    Provides logical composition of conditions using Boolean algebra.
    dk.tij.registermaschine.core.conditions.api - package dk.tij.registermaschine.core.conditions.api
    Provides the fundamental interfaces for conditional instruction execution.
    dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config - package dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config
    Provides the central configuration and initialisation logic for the Registermaschine.
    dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.api - package dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.api
    Defines the contract for configuration parsers within the Registermaschine.
    dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.internal - package dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.internal
    Implementation-specific parsing logic and condition-macro resolution.
    dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.internal.conditions - package dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.internal.conditions
     
    dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.internal.conditions.nodes - package dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.internal.conditions.nodes
     
    dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.internal.parsers - package dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.internal.parsers
     
    dk.tij.registermaschine.core.error - package dk.tij.registermaschine.core.error
    Defines the exception hierarchy for the Registermaschine engine.
    dk.tij.registermaschine.core.instructions - package dk.tij.registermaschine.core.instructions
    Provides concrete implementations of the standard Registermaschine instructions.
    dk.tij.registermaschine.core.instructions.api - package dk.tij.registermaschine.core.instructions.api
    Defines the core interfaces and base classes for the Registermaschine's instruction set.
    dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime - package dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime
    Provides the concrete implementation of the machine's runtime environment and instruction execution engine.
    dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.api - package dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.api
    Defines the core interfaces for the Registermaschine's execution environment.

    Internal DTD names
